mainEntity.name: Does the law force me to see the company doctor after I tripped and hurt my knee?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Utah and Idaho, employers generally have the right to choose the treating physician. You should consult a lawyer before switching doctors on your own to avoid losing coverage for medical bills.
